name: Chasing Google's Algorithm & Disappearing Reviews With Ben Fisher pt. 2
episode_summary: Ben Fisher is a Google Business Profile Diamond Product Expert, and an experienced veteran in SEO and social since 1994. He contributes to the Local Search Ranking Factors Survey and co-founded Steady Demand, which works with agencies and businesses to maximize outsourced Local SEO
episode_summary_rich_text:
It seems like everyone is tired of chasing Google's ever-changing algorithm. But why does Google keep making changes? We spoke with Ben Fisher to learn:

  • How Google algorithm changes center the user experience
  • What to do about disappearing Google reviews, and why they happen
  • What it means to be a GMB product expert (spoiler: you get to talk to Google a lot)
